message:
refactor(tests): Continue clippy compliance and code quality improvements

Additional test file updates following the same pattern as the previous
commit, addressing remaining clippy warnings and improving code structure.

common/mod.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_wraps)] to mock query() that must
  return Result for API consistency
- Use unwrap_or_else() with closure instead of unwrap_or() with
  Path::new() to avoid eager evaluation
- Replace ends_with(".json") with proper extension check via is_some_and()

sleep_real_time.rs / timeout_real_time.rs:
- Extract NotifyWaker struct to module level to avoid clippy warning
  about items defined inside test functions
- Fix missing semicolon on assert! statement

repro_cancel_strengthening.rs:
- Restructure test logic for better readability
- Add explicit type annotations where inference was ambiguous

net_udp.rs:
- Simplify socket address handling
- Remove redundant intermediate variables

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
